steps.title: Identify which notes directly answer the goal
steps.content: The goal is to identify the setting of My Ántonia. The notes explicitly state that some novels “are set in Nebraska” and list “My Ántonia (1918)” as one of these novels — directly indicating Nebraska as its setting.

steps.title: Match the setting information to the answer choices
steps.content: Answer A directly states “My Ántonia is set in Nebraska,” using the setting information from the notes to fulfill the goal. Choices B, C, and D either omit the setting, mention Nebraska without identifying My Ántonia specifically, or describe what the novels contain rather than where they're set. That matches choice A — A is correct.
